sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115636" key="yhro/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψηρός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n115636.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ξηρός</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μες[ς]<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όψηρον</itype>,</foreign> and perh. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψαρός</foreign> (B).</sense> </entryFree>
